title: How to block online ads and web trackers
description: Stop annoying pop-up ads, block trackers, and protect your privacy while speeding up your web browsing.

steps.title: Open your web browser extension store
steps.body: Open your web browser (Chrome, Edge, or Firefox). Click the menu button (three dots or lines in the top right), select 'Extensions', and click 'Open Chrome Web Store' or 'Add-ons'.

steps.title: Search for uBlock Origin
steps.body: Type 'uBlock Origin' in the search bar of the store. uBlock Origin is widely recommended because it is completely free, open-source, and does not slow down your computer.

steps.title: Click Add to Browser
steps.body: Tap the blue button that says 'Add to Chrome', 'Get', or 'Add to Firefox'. A small window will pop up asking for confirmation. Click 'Add extension'.

steps.title: Confirm it is active
steps.body: You will see a small red shield icon appear in the top-right corner of your browser toolbar. This shield automatically blocks ads. When you visit websites, you will notice clean pages with no flashing banners!

glossary.definition: A small add-on program you install inside your web browser to give it extra features, like ad-blockers or price comparison tools.
A hidden script on websites that records your clicks, search history, and shopping habits to show you targeted ads.
